positive: A stylized illustration of a majestic mountain landscape at dawn. The composition should feature layered peaks, rolling foothills, and a winding river, all rendered in a clean, graphic silhouette style. The color palette must be limited and high-contrast, utilizing deep sapphire blues, burnt orange, and creamy pale yellow, suggesting both dawn light and cool shadows. Emphasize strong, clean outlines and vector-like quality suitable for screen printing. Include abstract geometric patterns subtly integrated into the sky or foreground elements, suggesting topographical maps. Central composition, full-bleed design, designed for apparel placement. Minimalist yet dramatic.
